steps.title: Calculate land area
steps.content:
Subtract water area from total area:
$$92.1 - 11.3 = 80.8 \text{ square miles}$$

steps.title: Calculate population density
steps.content:
Divide population by land area:
$$\frac{621,000}{80.8} \approx 7,687 \text{ people per square mile}$$
This is closest to choice B — B is correct.
